scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n "web,api,sidecar" -c "blue,green,magenta" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:sidecar"
scripts.setup:api: python -m pip install -r backend/requirements.txt && python -c "from backend.app import create_app; from backend.app.extensions import db; app = create_app(); with app.app_context(): db.create_all()"
scripts.setup:all: npm install && npm run setup:web && npm run setup:api && npm run setup:sidecar
